task_completion.description: Verify that a new dashboard has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard interface is visible in the application.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard is named 'Facility Kiosk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Facility Kiosk' appears as the dashboard title at the top of the screen or in the dashboard settings.

task_completion.description: Verify a text widget is added to the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panel specifically of type 'Text' is visible on the dashboard or is actively being edited.

task_completion.description: Verify the text widget contains an HTML link to 'Solar Array A'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Solar Array A' is visible inside the text widget, formatted as an HTML link (either showing `<a href=...>` in edit mode or appearing as a clickable hyperlink in view mode).

task_completion.description: Verify the text widget contains an HTML link to 'HVAC Main'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'HVAC Main' is visible inside the text widget, formatted as an HTML link (either showing `<a href=...>` in edit mode or appearing as a clickable hyperlink in view mode).

task_completion.description: Verify the text widget contains an HTML link to 'Lighting Zones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Lighting Zones' is visible inside the text widget, formatted as an HTML link (either showing `<a href=...>` in edit mode or appearing as a clickable hyperlink in view mode).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser displaying the dashboard application is visible with standard UI interactions, rather than a terminal window executing API/curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the text widget editing occurs within the actual dashboard application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML/text editing is taking place inside the dashboard application's panel editor, not in an external text editor like Notepad, nano, or VS Code.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created HTML links rather than plain text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text widget content shows actual HTML anchor tags (<a>) with href attributes in edit mode, or properly styled, clickable hyperlinks in view mode.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dashboard to be created must be named exactly 'Facility Kiosk'. It must contain a text widget with HTML links pointing to three specific target dashboards: 'Solar Array A', 'HVAC Main', and 'Lighting Zones'. The agent is required to use the actual Dashboard IDs for these links, meaning the href attributes in the HTML should contain specific IDs or URLs corresponding to those dashboards.
